prompt: A hyper-realistic, intense, over-the-top illustration of three elderly people in a fiery, apocalyptic setting. In the foreground, two elderly DJs are intensely scratching on detailed turntables while screaming aggressively. On the left is an elderly woman with purple hair in a top bun. On the right is an elderly man with spiky blonde punk hair and sunglasses. Between them in the background is a massive erupting volcano surrounded by roaring flames, flying sparks, and smoke. Looming at the top center of the image is a third elderly man with white hair and a beard, wearing a purple hoodie with the word "KAMI" faintly visible, shouting with his hands raised making two-finger gestures against a backdrop of dark stormy clouds. Across the center of the image, hovering in front of the volcano, is large, jagged, neon graffiti-style text reading "DJBBA" in vibrant blue, green, and pink colors. The overall lighting is dramatic, illuminated by the intense orange and yellow glow of the fire.
